prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Alright, listen up! That task you've been circling all morning? It's time. You've got this. You're smarter, tougher, and more capable than you think. Break it down, take a deep breath, and just start. Momentum is your friend, and once you get going, you'll wonder why you even hesitated. This isn't just about finishing the task, it's about proving to yourself what you can do. Let's conquer this thing – you've earned that feeling of accomplishment. Now go get it done!
